---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, improvement, or integration
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the scenario where you wanted this. Who is affected? How often?

## Proposed solution
One or two sentences on what you'd like to see in the app.

## Alternatives considered
Any workarounds you've used, or similar features in other tools
(Czkawka, DropIt, Hazel, File Juggler, TagStudio, etc.).

## Additional context
Mockups, links to reference implementations, or anything else that helps
clarify the request.
